body:
Hi Laura,

The new candle line labels are gorgeous - the ampersand on the Harbor & Pine scent is exactly the warmth we wanted. One small ask before we send to print: can you nudge the kerning on the 'Co.' so it sits a touch closer? Otherwise we're ready. Invoice whenever you like.

Thank you,
Priya
snippet: Hi Laura, The new candle line labels are gorgeous - the ampersand on the Harbor & Pine scent is exactly the warmth we wanted...
subject: Harbor Candle labels - almost there

body:
Hi Priya,

So glad you love it. Kerning on the 'Co.' tightened and uploaded - same Drive folder, version dated today. Print-ready files are flattened and the editable AI is alongside. I'll send the invoice this afternoon.

Laura
snippet: Hi Priya, So glad you love it. Kerning on the 'Co.' tightened and uploaded - same Drive folder, version dated today...
subject: Re: Harbor Candle labels - almost there

body:
Laura,

Invoice received and approved on our end. Payment goes out Friday. Already thinking about the holiday tin set - can we hold a week of your December for it?

Priya
snippet: Laura, Invoice received and approved on our end. Payment goes out Friday. Already thinking about the holiday tin set...
subject: Re: Harbor Candle labels - almost there

body:
Hi Claire,

The Maison Paper packaging system is on BigCommerce-ready files now. I built the wrap pattern as a seamless tile so it scales across box sizes without re-art. Proofs are in the shared folder. Let me know if the sage and cream split reads right on your stock samples.

Laura
snippet: Hi Claire, The Maison Paper packaging system is on BigCommerce-ready files now. I built the wrap pattern as a seamless tile...
subject: Maison Paper packaging - proofs ready

body:
Laura,

The sage and cream is perfect on the kraft stock - softer than I expected, in the best way. Approving the proofs. You have such a steady hand with restraint. Sending the deposit for phase two today.

Claire
snippet: Laura, The sage and cream is perfect on the kraft stock - softer than I expected, in the best way. Approving the proofs...
subject: Re: Maison Paper packaging - proofs ready

body:
Hi Laura,

We're rebuilding the BrightFox onboarding flow and want the illustration set to feel less corporate, more human. Could you sketch three directions for the empty-states? Our Mixpanel data says people drop right where there's no guidance, so a little warmth might go a long way.

Daniel
snippet: Hi Laura, We're rebuilding the BrightFox onboarding flow and want the illustration set to feel less corporate, more human...
subject: BrightFox onboarding illustrations

body:
Hi Daniel,

Love this brief. Three directions coming: one hand-drawn and loose, one geometric with rounded forms, one mid-point between the two. I'll annotate where each empty-state lives in the flow so you can map them to the drop-off points. Rough thumbnails by end of week.

Laura
snippet: Hi Daniel, Love this brief. Three directions coming: one hand-drawn and loose, one geometric with rounded forms...
subject: Re: BrightFox onboarding illustrations

body:
Laura,

The hand-drawn set won internally - it tested warmer in our quick team poll. Greenlit for the full set of nine. PostHog will tell us soon enough if drop-off improves. Thanks for getting us here.

Daniel
snippet: Laura, The hand-drawn set won internally - it tested warmer in our quick team poll. Greenlit for the full set of nine...
subject: Re: BrightFox onboarding illustrations

body:
Hi Laura,

Mike and I are still floating about the consultation - the monogram sketches you showed made it feel real. We're set on the script for the invitations and the arch sign for the ceremony. The wedding is the second Saturday of March 2027, so we have time, but I get excited just thinking about it.

Katie
snippet: Hi Laura, Mike and I are still floating about the consultation - the monogram sketches you showed made it feel real...
subject: Bridal lettering - so excited

body:
Hi Katie,

This made my whole day. I'll firm up the script weight and rough the arch sign at scale so you can picture it in the space. Let's lock the consultation for October to map invitations, signage, and the day-of pieces. Bring any fabric or florals that set the palette.

Laura
snippet: Hi Katie, This made my whole day. I'll firm up the script weight and rough the arch sign at scale so you can picture it...
subject: Re: Bridal lettering - so excited

body:
Honey,

Dad and I are doing a big Sunday lunch this weekend - Brian and Dana are bringing Lily, and she has finally learned to say your name, sort of. It comes out 'Lala' and it is the cutest thing. Come hungry. Bring nothing but yourself.

Love,
Mom
snippet: Honey, Dad and I are doing a big Sunday lunch this weekend - Brian and Dana are bringing Lily, and she has finally learned...
subject: Sunday lunch

body:
Hi Mom,

I'll be there - tell Lily her Aunt Lala says hi. I'll bring a tin of the Anthology beans Dad likes and maybe a little lettered card for the fridge. See you Sunday.

Love you,
Laura
snippet: Hi Mom, I'll be there - tell Lily her Aunt Lala says hi. I'll bring a tin of the Anthology beans Dad likes...
subject: Re: Sunday lunch

body:
Hey Laura,

The Northline Boutique site is staged and Algolia search is wired up. I plugged in your icon set for the category headers - they look great. Can you review the staging link and flag anything visual before we push live? No rush, early next week is fine.

Tyler
snippet: Hey Laura, The Northline Boutique site is staged and Algolia search is wired up. I plugged in your icon set...
subject: Northline staging ready for review

body:
Hey Tyler,

Staging looks clean. Two small things: the category icons want four more pixels of breathing room, and the search field placeholder should be sentence case to match the brand voice. Otherwise ship it. Nice work on the search.

Laura
snippet: Hey Tyler, Staging looks clean. Two small things: the category icons want four more pixels of breathing room...
subject: Re: Northline staging ready for review

body:
Following up on the holiday tin timeline - I can hold the first full week of December for Harbor Candle. Want me to pencil it in?

Laura
snippet: Following up on the holiday tin timeline - I can hold the first full week of December for Harbor Candle...
subject: Re: Harbor Candle labels - almost there
